semantic.role: System vision and module orchestration document for the ArchSpine mirror architecture
responsibilities: Defining the high-level vision and purpose of the ArchSpine mirror system
Describing module orchestration patterns and inter-module communication
Establishing the architectural narrative for the project
outOfScope: Detailed implementation specifications or code-level instructions
Specific API contracts or data schemas

English.purpose: This document serves as the foundational narrative for the ArchSpine mirror system, articulating the core vision and the orchestration logic that binds its modules together. It exists to align all contributors—both human and AI—on the architectural intent and systemic behavior of the project.
English.context_and_audience: The intended audience includes system architects, developers, documentation maintainers, and AI agents who need a conceptual understanding of how ArchSpine modules interact and what the system aims to achieve. It is a reference for anyone involved in extending or maintaining the mirror architecture.
key_takeaways: The document defines the overarching vision that drives all module design decisions.
Module orchestration is described as a structured pattern of interaction, not a fixed implementation.
The narrative is meant to be stable over time, serving as a touchstone for architectural consistency.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是ArchSpine镜像系统的核心叙事基础，阐明了系统的核心愿景以及连接各模块的编排逻辑。它的存在是为了让所有贡献者——无论是人类还是AI代理——在项目的架构意图和系统行为上保持一致。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 目标读者包括系统架构师、开发者、文档维护者以及需要理解ArchSpine模块如何交互以及系统目标的AI代理。它是任何参与扩展或维护镜像架构的人员的参考指南。
key_takeaways: 本文档定义了驱动所有模块设计决策的总体愿景。
模块编排被描述为一种结构化的交互模式，而非固定的实现方式。
该叙事旨在保持长期稳定，作为架构一致性的试金石。
